judgment.summary: DoorDash shows strong revenue growth and free cash flow but has a high trailing P/E and recent earnings decline.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus by 15.4%; next earnings date is 2026-05-06.
positives: Revenue growth 33.1% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Free cash flow $2.30B TTM — healthy cash generation.
Forward P/E 20.64x — significantly lower than trailing P/E, indicating expected earnings growth.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target of $245.99.
negatives: Trailing P/E 76.15x — valuation appears very high based on current earnings.
Earnings growth -6.1% YoY and quarterly earnings growth -4.7% — recent profitability has declined.
Analyst growth estimate for current quarter is negative (-13.0%).
Beta 1.87 — stock is more volatile than the broader market.
